---
title: "microclima"
author: "Edith"
date: "2025-11-04"
output: html_document
---
data
```{r}
setwd("C:/Users/edith clemente arena/Desktop/EPIFITAS -GRADIENTE/treeline-epiphytes/treeline-epiphytes/Doble_filtro/Data")
climadata <- read.csv("dataclima.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

str(climadata)      # Estructura de la base de datos
head(climadata)
head(climadata$date_hour)
str(climadata$date_hour)
```

graphic of illumination
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
library(tidyr)
library(patchwork)
# 1️⃣ Convertir la fecha-hora al formato correcto
climadata <- climadata %>%
  mutate(date_hour = as.POSIXct(date_hour, format = "%d/%m/%Y %H:%M", tz = "America/Lima"))
# 2️⃣ Reorganizar datos en formato largo (para ggplot)
clima_long <- climadata %>%
  dplyr::select(date_hour, ilum_puna, ilum_forest) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(ilum_puna, ilum_forest),
    names_to = "logger_id",
    values_to = "light_lum_ft2"
  ) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date_hour))  # extraer solo la fecha
# 3️⃣ Calcular la media diaria ±95% CI por logger
daily_light <- clima_long %>%
  group_by(date, logger_id) %>%
  summarise(
    n_obs   = sum(!is.na(light_lum_ft2)),
    light_mean = mean(light_lum_ft2, na.rm = TRUE),
    light_sd   = sd(light_lum_ft2, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_l       = light_sd / sqrt(pmax(n_obs, 1)),
    tcrit      = qt(0.975, df = pmax(n_obs - 1, 1)),
    ci         = tcrit * se_l,
    .groups = "drop"
  )
# 4️⃣ Gráfico: Mean Daily Light Intensity (±95% CI)
ggplot(daily_light, aes(x = date, y = light_mean, color = logger_id, fill = logger_id)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = light_mean - ci, ymax = light_mean + ci), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Daily Light Intensity (Peru Time, ±95% CI)",
    x = "Date (UTC-5)",
    y = "Light Intensity (lum/ft²)",
    color = "Logger",
    fill  = "Logger"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "ilum_forest" = "#228B22",
    "ilum_puna"   = "#8B4513"
  ),
  labels = c("Forest", "Puna")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "ilum_forest" = "#228B22",
    "ilum_puna"   = "#8B4513"
  ),
  labels = c("Forest", "Puna")) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "7 days", date_labels = "%d.%m") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 4500)) +                        # ajusta el rango según tus valores
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 9000, by = 1000)) +
  theme_light(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey85", linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )
```
graphics of temperature
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
library(tidyr)
# 1️⃣ Convertir la fecha-hora al formato correcto
climadata <- climadata %>%
  mutate(date_hour = as.POSIXct(date_hour, format = "%d/%m/%Y %H:%M", tz = "America/Lima"))
# 2️⃣ Reorganizar datos en formato largo
temp_long <- climadata %>%
  dplyr::select(date_hour, t_puna, t_forest) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(t_puna, t_forest),
    names_to = "logger_id",
    values_to = "temperature"
  ) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date_hour))
# 3️⃣ Calcular la media diaria ±95% CI por logger
daily_temp <- temp_long %>%
  group_by(date, logger_id) %>%
  summarise(
    n_obs   = sum(!is.na(temperature)),
    temp_mean = mean(temperature, na.rm = TRUE),
    temp_sd   = sd(temperature, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_t      = temp_sd / sqrt(pmax(n_obs, 1)),
    tcrit     = qt(0.975, df = pmax(n_obs - 1, 1)),
    ci        = tcrit * se_t,
    .groups = "drop"
  )
# 4️⃣ Gráfico: Mean Daily Temperature (±95% CI)
ggplot(daily_temp, aes(x = date, y = temp_mean, color = logger_id, fill = logger_id)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = temp_mean - ci, ymax = temp_mean + ci), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Daily Temperature (Peru Time, ±95% CI)",
    x = "Date (UTC-5)",
    y = "Temperature (°C)",
    color = "Logger",
    fill  = "Logger"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "t_forest" = "#228B22",  # verde
    "t_puna"   = "#8B4513"   # marrón
  ),
  labels = c("Forest", "Puna")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "t_forest" = "#228B22",
    "t_puna"   = "#8B4513"
  ),
  labels = c("Forest", "Puna")) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "7 days", date_labels = "%d.%m") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(min(daily_temp$temp_mean - daily_temp$ci, na.rm = TRUE) - 1,
                           max(daily_temp$temp_mean + daily_temp$ci, na.rm = TRUE) + 1)) +
  theme_light(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey85", linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )
```
graphic of humidity HR
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
library(tidyr)
# 1️⃣ Convertir fecha y hora
climadata <- climadata %>%
  mutate(date_hour = as.POSIXct(date_hour, format = "%d/%m/%Y %H:%M", tz = "America/Lima"))
# 2️⃣ Reorganizar datos (formato largo)
hr_long <- climadata %>%
  dplyr::select(date_hour, hr_puna, hr_forest) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(hr_puna, hr_forest),
    names_to = "logger_id",
    values_to = "humidity"
  ) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date_hour))
# 3️⃣ Calcular media diaria ±95% CI por logger
daily_hr <- hr_long %>%
  group_by(date, logger_id) %>%
  summarise(
    n_obs   = sum(!is.na(humidity)),
    hr_mean = mean(humidity, na.rm = TRUE),
    hr_sd   = sd(humidity, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_h    = hr_sd / sqrt(pmax(n_obs, 1)),
    tcrit   = qt(0.975, df = pmax(n_obs - 1, 1)),
    ci      = tcrit * se_h,
    .groups = "drop"
  )
# 4️⃣ Gráfico: Mean Daily Relative Humidity (±95% CI)
ggplot(daily_hr, aes(x = date, y = hr_mean, color = logger_id, fill = logger_id)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = hr_mean - ci, ymax = hr_mean + ci), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Daily Relative Humidity (Peru Time, ±95% CI)",
    x = "Date (UTC-5)",
    y = "Relative Humidity (%)",
    color = "Logger",
    fill  = "Logger"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "hr_forest" = "#228B22",  # verde bosque
    "hr_puna"   = "#8B4513"   # marrón puna
  ),
  labels = c("Forest", "Puna")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "hr_forest" = "#228B22",
    "hr_puna"   = "#8B4513"
  ),
  labels = c("Forest", "Puna")) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "7 days", date_labels = "%d.%m") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +  # HR va de 0–100%
  theme_light(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey85", linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )


#CORREGIR

ggplot(
  daily_hr,
  aes(
    x = date,
    y = hr_mean,
    color = logger_id,
    fill = logger_id
  )
) +

  # IC95%
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(
      ymin = hr_mean - ci,
      ymax = hr_mean + ci
    ),
    alpha = 0.35,
    color = NA
  ) +

  # Media diaria
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +

  labs(
    title = "Mean Daily Relative Humidity (Peru Time, ±95% CI)",
    x = "Date (UTC-5)",
    y = "Relative Humidity (%)",
    color = "Logger",
    fill  = "Logger"
  ) +

  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "hr_forest" = "#228B22",
      "hr_puna"   = "#8B4513"
    ),
    labels = c("Forest", "Puna")
  ) +

  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "hr_forest" = "#228B22",
      "hr_puna"   = "#8B4513"
    ),
    labels = c("Forest", "Puna")
  ) +

  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "7 days",
    date_labels = "%d.%m"
  ) +

  coord_cartesian(
    ylim = c(
      min(daily_hr$hr_mean - daily_hr$ci, na.rm = TRUE) - 2,
      max(daily_hr$hr_mean + daily_hr$ci, na.rm = TRUE) + 2
    )
  ) +

  theme_light(base_size = 13) +

  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.major = element_line(
      color = "grey85",
      linewidth = 0.3
    ),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(
      face = "bold",
      hjust = 0.5
    ),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1
    )
  )

```
graphic combined
```{r}
# Tema compacto
tema_compacto <- theme_light(base_size = 8) +  # tamaño base más pequeño
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 7),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 7),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 8, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none"
  )
# 1️ LUZ (ilum_puna / ilum_forest)
g_light <- ggplot(daily_light, aes(x = date, y = light_mean, color = logger_id, fill = logger_id)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = light_mean - ci, ymax = light_mean + ci),
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
  labs(y = "Light (lum/ft²)", x = NULL, title = "A) Light Intensity") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("ilum_forest" = "#228B22", "ilum_puna" = "#8B4513"),
                     labels = c("Forest", "Puna")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("ilum_forest" = "#228B22", "ilum_puna" = "#8B4513"),
                    labels = c("Forest", "Puna")) +
  tema_compacto
g_light <- g_light +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14)
  )

# 2️ TEMPERATURA
g_temp <- ggplot(daily_temp, aes(x = date, y = temp_mean, color = logger_id, fill = logger_id)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = temp_mean - ci, ymax = temp_mean + ci),
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
  labs(y = "Temperature (°C)", x = NULL, title = "B) Temperature") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("t_forest" = "#228B22", "t_puna" = "#8B4513"),
                     labels = c("Forest", "Puna")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("t_forest" = "#228B22", "t_puna" = "#8B4513"),
                    labels = c("Forest", "Puna")) +
  tema_compacto

g_temp <- g_temp +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14)
  )

g_temp

# 3️ HUMEDAD RELATIVA
g_hr <- ggplot(daily_hr, aes(x = date, y = hr_mean, color = logger_id, fill = logger_id)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = hr_mean - ci, ymax = hr_mean + ci),
              alpha = 0.45, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
  labs(y = "Relative Humidity (%)", x = "Date", title = "C) Relative Humidity") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("hr_forest" = "#228B22", "hr_puna" = "#8B4513"),
                     labels = c("Forest", "Puna")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("hr_forest" = "#228B22", "hr_puna" = "#8B4513"),
                    labels = c("Forest", "Puna")) +
  tema_compacto +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

g_hr <- g_hr +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14)
  )
g_hr
#Tema profesional uniforme
tema_publicacion <- theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )
#aplicar el tema en los graficos
g_light <- g_light + tema_publicacion +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    date_labels = "%b"
  )

g_temp  <- g_temp  + tema_publicacion +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    date_labels = "%b"
  )

g_hr    <- g_hr    + tema_publicacion +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    date_labels = "%b"
  )

# 4️ COMBINAR LOS GRÁFICOS
g_clima <- (g_light / g_temp / g_hr) +
  plot_layout(
    heights = c(1,1,1),
    guides = "collect"   # <- recoge todas las leyendas en una sola
  ) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = " ",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
  ) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")   # <- mueve la leyenda abajo


ggsave(
  filename = "Environmental_conditions_patchwork.png",
  plot = g_clima,
  width = 12,       # ancho en pulgadas
  height = 14,      # alto en pulgadas (3 paneles)
  dpi = 300         # resolución alta
)
```
NOTA: corregido el cambio de los sensores de temperatura y humedad


```{r}
# ==============================
# LIBRERÍAS
# ==============================
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# ==============================
# TEMA DE PUBLICACIÓN (uniforme)
# ==============================
tema_publicacion <- theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# ==============================
# ESCALA DE FECHAS CADA 1 MES
# ==============================
escala_fecha <- scale_x_date(
  date_breaks = "1 month",
  date_labels = "%b"
)
unique(daily_light$logger_id)
unique(daily_temp_clean$logger_id)
unique(daily_hr_clean$logger_id)
# ==============================
# 1) LUZ
# ==============================
g_light <- ggplot(daily_light, aes(date, light_mean, color = logger_id, fill = logger_id)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = light_mean - ci, ymax = light_mean + ci),
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
  labs(y = "Light Intensity (lum/ft²)", x = NULL, title = "A) Light Intensity") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("ilum_forest" = "#228B22", "ilum_puna" = "#8B4513"),
                     labels = c("Forest", "Puna")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("ilum_forest" = "#228B22", "ilum_puna" = "#8B4513"),
                    labels = c("Forest", "Puna")) +
  escala_fecha +
  tema_publicacion +
  theme(legend.position = "none")   # quitar leyenda aquí


# ==============================
# 2) TEMPERATURA 
# ==============================
daily_temp_clean <- daily_temp %>% 
  filter(!is.na(temp_mean), !is.na(ci), n_obs > 1)

g_temp <- ggplot(daily_temp_clean, aes(date, temp_mean, color = logger_id, fill = logger_id)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = temp_mean - ci, ymax = temp_mean + ci),
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
  labs(y = "Temperature (°C)", x = NULL, title = "B) Temperature") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("t_forest" = "#228B22", "t_puna" = "#8B4513"),
                     labels = c("Forest", "Puna")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("t_forest" = "#228B22", "t_puna" = "#8B4513"),
                    labels = c("Forest", "Puna")) +
  escala_fecha +
  tema_publicacion +
  theme(legend.position = "none")   # quitar leyenda aquí


# ==============================
# 3) HUMEDAD RELATIVA
# ==============================
daily_hr_clean <- daily_hr %>% 
  filter(!is.na(hr_mean), !is.na(ci), n_obs > 1)

g_hr <- ggplot(daily_hr_clean, aes(date, hr_mean, color = logger_id, fill = logger_id)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = hr_mean - ci, ymax = hr_mean + ci),
              alpha = 0.4, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
  labs(y = "Relative Humidity (%)", x = "Date", title = "C) Relative Humidity") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("hr_forest" = "#228B22", "hr_puna" = "#8B4513"),
                     labels = c("Forest", "Puna")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("hr_forest" = "#228B22", "hr_puna" = "#8B4513"),
                    labels = c("Forest", "Puna")) +
  escala_fecha +
  tema_publicacion +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")   # SOLO aquí dejamos leyenda


# ==============================
# COMBINAR LOS TRES GRÁFICOS
# ==============================
g_clima <- (g_light / g_temp / g_hr) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1,1,1), guides = "collect") +  # collect = una sola leyenda
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Daily Environmental Conditions (Puna vs Forest, ±95% CI)",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))+
      theme(legend.position = "bottom")

  )

# ==============================
# MOSTRAR
# ==============================
g_clima

# ==============================
# EXPORTAR PARA PAPER
# ==============================
ggsave("Environmental_conditions_panel.png", g_clima,
       width = 12, height = 14, dpi = 300)

# Versión journal (TIFF 600 dpi)
ggsave("Environmental_conditions_panel.tiff", g_clima,
       width = 12, height = 14, dpi = 600, compression = "lzw")

#para el caption calcula media, min y max
daily_light %>%
  group_by(logger_id) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(light_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    min = min(light_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(light_mean, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

daily_temp %>%
  group_by(logger_id) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(temp_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    min = min(temp_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(temp_mean, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

daily_hr %>%
  group_by(logger_id) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(hr_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    min = min(hr_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(hr_mean, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```


ultimo grafico corregido lo de tratamientos 
```{r}
g_light <- ggplot(daily_light,
                  aes(date, light_mean, color = logger_id, fill = logger_id)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = light_mean - ci,
                  ymax = light_mean + ci),
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
  labs(
    y = "Light Intensity (lum/ft²)",
    x = NULL,
    title = "A) Light Intensity"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Treatment",
    values = c(
      "ilum_forest" = "#228B22",
      "ilum_puna"   = "#8B4513"
    ),
    labels = c("Forest", "Puna")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Treatment",
    values = c(
      "ilum_forest" = "#228B22",
      "ilum_puna"   = "#8B4513"
    ),
    labels = c("Forest", "Puna")
  ) +
  escala_fecha +
  tema_publicacion +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

g_temp <- ggplot(daily_temp_clean,
                 aes(date, temp_mean, color = logger_id, fill = logger_id)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = temp_mean - ci,
                  ymax = temp_mean + ci),
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
  labs(
    y = "Temperature (°C)",
    x = NULL,
    title = "B) Temperature"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Treatment",
    values = c(
      "t_forest" = "#228B22",
      "t_puna"   = "#8B4513"
    ),
    labels = c("Forest", "Puna")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Treatment",
    values = c(
      "t_forest" = "#228B22",
      "t_puna"   = "#8B4513"
    ),
    labels = c("Forest", "Puna")
  ) +
  escala_fecha +
  tema_publicacion +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
g_hr <- ggplot(daily_hr_clean,
               aes(date, hr_mean, color = logger_id, fill = logger_id)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = hr_mean - ci,
                  ymax = hr_mean + ci),
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
  labs(
    y = "Relative Humidity (%)",
    x = "Date",
    title = "C) Relative Humidity"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Treatment",
    values = c(
      "hr_forest" = "#228B22",
      "hr_puna"   = "#8B4513"
    ),
    labels = c("Forest", "Puna")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Treatment",
    values = c(
      "hr_forest" = "#228B22",
      "hr_puna"   = "#8B4513"
    ),
    labels = c("Forest", "Puna")
  ) +
  escala_fecha +
  tema_publicacion +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

g_clima <- (g_light / g_temp / g_hr) +
  plot_layout(
    heights = c(1, 1, 1),
    guides = "collect"
  ) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Daily Environmental Conditions (Puna vs Forest, ±95% CI)",
    theme = theme(
      plot.title = element_text(
        size = 16,
        face = "bold",
        hjust = 0.5
      )
    )
  ) &
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11)
  )

ggsave("Environmental_conditions_panel.png", g_clima,
       width = 12, height = 14, dpi = 300)
```




Evaluating differences between treatments

Chunk 1: Data Import & Preparation
```{r}
# ============================================================
# CHUNK 1: DATA IMPORT & PREPARATION
# ============================================================
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(mgcv)
library(boot)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)

# Read data
climadata <- read.csv("./Doble_filtro/Data/dataclima.csv", 
                      header = TRUE, sep = ";", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Convert date_hour to POSIXct
climadata <- climadata %>%
  mutate(date_hour = as.POSIXct(date_hour, format = "%d/%m/%Y %H:%M", tz = "America/Lima"))

# ---- Prepare long data for temperature and humidity ----
long_data <- climadata %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(date_hour),
    hour_of_day = as.numeric(format(date_hour, "%H")) + 
                  as.numeric(format(date_hour, "%M"))/60,
    date_numeric = as.numeric(date)
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(temp_puna, temp_forest, hr_puna, hr_forest),
    names_to = c("variable", "habitat"),
    names_pattern = "(.*)_(.*)",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = variable, 
    values_from = value
  )

# ---- Prepare light data in long format ----
# NOTE: Light sensor clock was offset by ~9 hours.
# Subtracting 9 hours aligns light peak with solar noon (~12:00).
light_data <- climadata %>%
  mutate(
    date_hour_light = date_hour - hours(9),  # correct sensor clock offset
    date = as.Date(date_hour_light),
    hour_of_day = hour(date_hour_light) + minute(date_hour_light)/60,
    date_numeric = as.numeric(date)
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(ilum_puna, ilum_forest),
    names_to = "habitat",
    values_to = "light_intensity",  # lum/ft²
    names_prefix = "ilum_"
  )

# ---- GAMs for statistical inference ----
# Temperature
mod_temp <- gam(temp ~ habitat + 
                s(hour_of_day, bs = "cc", k = 24) +  
                s(date_numeric, bs = "tp", k = 20),
              data = long_data)
cat("\n=== TEMPERATURE GAM ===\n")
summary(mod_temp)

# Humidity
mod_hr <- gam(hr ~ habitat + 
              s(hour_of_day, bs = "cc", k = 24) +  
              s(date_numeric, bs = "tp", k = 20),
            data = long_data)
cat("\n=== HUMIDITY GAM ===\n")
summary(mod_hr)

# Light intensity (log-transformed for zeros at night)
light_data$light_log <- log(light_data$light_intensity + 1)
mod_light <- gam(light_log ~ habitat + 
                 s(hour_of_day, bs = "cc", k = 24),
               data = light_data)
cat("\n=== LIGHT INTENSITY GAM (log scale) ===\n")
summary(mod_light)

cat("\n✓ Data preparation and GAMs complete\n")
```

Chunk 2: Bootstrap Analysis & Results Table
```{r}
# ============================================================
# CHUNK 2: BOOTSTRAP ANALYSIS & RESULTS
# ============================================================

# ---- Create daily summaries ----

# Temperature and humidity
daily_summary <- long_data %>%
  group_by(date, habitat) %>%
  summarise(
    temp_mean = mean(temp, na.rm = TRUE),
    temp_max = max(temp, na.rm = TRUE),
    temp_min = min(temp, na.rm = TRUE),
    temp_range = temp_max - temp_min,
    hr_mean = mean(hr, na.rm = TRUE),
    hr_min = min(hr, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

# Light intensity (from long-format light_data, with corrected timestamps)
daily_light <- light_data %>%
  group_by(date, habitat) %>%
  summarise(
    light_integral = sum(light_intensity, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.5,
    light_max = max(light_intensity, na.rm = TRUE),
    light_daytime = mean(light_intensity[hour_of_day >= 6 & hour_of_day <= 18], na.rm = TRUE),
    light_hours = sum(light_intensity > 0, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.5,
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = date,
    names_from = habitat,
    values_from = c(light_integral, light_max, light_daytime, light_hours)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    light_integral_diff = light_integral_puna - light_integral_forest,
    light_max_diff = light_max_puna - light_max_forest,
    light_daytime_diff = light_daytime_puna - light_daytime_forest,
    light_hours_diff = light_hours_puna - light_hours_forest,
    light_integral_ratio = light_integral_puna / light_integral_forest
  )

# ---- Paired differences ----
daily_diff <- daily_summary %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = date,
    names_from = habitat,
    values_from = c(temp_mean, temp_max, temp_min, temp_range, hr_mean, hr_min)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    temp_diff = temp_mean_puna - temp_mean_forest,
    temp_max_diff = temp_max_puna - temp_max_forest,
    temp_min_diff = temp_min_puna - temp_min_forest,
    range_diff = temp_range_puna - temp_range_forest,
    hr_diff = hr_mean_puna - hr_mean_forest,
    hr_min_diff = hr_min_puna - hr_min_forest
  )

# ---- Bootstrap ----
set.seed(123)

boot_temp <- boot(daily_diff, function(d, i) mean(d$temp_diff[i], na.rm = TRUE), R = 9999)
boot_temp_max <- boot(daily_diff, function(d, i) mean(d$temp_max_diff[i], na.rm = TRUE), R = 9999)
boot_temp_min <- boot(daily_diff, function(d, i) mean(d$temp_min_diff[i], na.rm = TRUE), R = 9999)
boot_range <- boot(daily_diff, function(d, i) mean(d$range_diff[i], na.rm = TRUE), R = 9999)
boot_hr <- boot(daily_diff, function(d, i) mean(d$hr_diff[i], na.rm = TRUE), R = 9999)
boot_hr_min <- boot(daily_diff, function(d, i) mean(d$hr_min_diff[i], na.rm = TRUE), R = 9999)
boot_light_integral <- boot(daily_light, function(d, i) mean(d$light_integral_diff[i], na.rm = TRUE), R = 9999)
boot_light_max <- boot(daily_light, function(d, i) mean(d$light_max_diff[i], na.rm = TRUE), R = 9999)
boot_light_daytime <- boot(daily_light, function(d, i) mean(d$light_daytime_diff[i], na.rm = TRUE), R = 9999)
boot_light_hours <- boot(daily_light, function(d, i) mean(d$light_hours_diff[i], na.rm = TRUE), R = 9999)
boot_light_ratio <- boot(daily_light, function(d, i) mean(d$light_integral_ratio[i], na.rm = TRUE), R = 9999)

# ---- Compile results table ----
results <- data.frame(
  Variable = c(
    "Mean temperature", "Daily temperature range", "Maximum temperature",
    "Minimum temperature", "Mean relative humidity", "Minimum relative humidity",
    "Daily light integral", "Maximum light intensity",
    "Daytime mean light intensity", "Hours with light"
  ),
  Units = c("°C", "°C", "°C", "°C", "%", "%", 
            "lum/ft²·hours", "lum/ft²", "lum/ft²", "hours"),
  Puna = c(
    mean(daily_diff$temp_mean_puna, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(daily_diff$temp_range_puna, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(daily_diff$temp_max_puna, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(daily_diff$temp_min_puna, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(daily_diff$hr_mean_puna, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(daily_diff$hr_min_puna, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(daily_light$light_integral_puna, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(daily_light$light_max_puna, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(daily_light$light_daytime_puna, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(daily_light$light_hours_puna, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  Forest = c(
    mean(daily_diff$temp_mean_forest, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(daily_diff$temp_range_forest, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(daily_diff$temp_max_forest, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(daily_diff$temp_min_forest, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(daily_diff$hr_mean_forest, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(daily_diff$hr_min_forest, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(daily_light$light_integral_forest, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(daily_light$light_max_forest, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(daily_light$light_daytime_forest, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(daily_light$light_hours_forest, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  Difference = c(
    boot_temp$t0, boot_range$t0, boot_temp_max$t0, boot_temp_min$t0,
    boot_hr$t0, boot_hr_min$t0,
    boot_light_integral$t0, boot_light_max$t0,
    boot_light_daytime$t0, boot_light_hours$t0
  ),
  CI_lower = c(
    boot.ci(boot_temp, type = "perc")$percent[4],
    boot.ci(boot_range, type = "perc")$percent[4],
    boot.ci(boot_temp_max, type = "perc")$percent[4],
    boot.ci(boot_temp_min, type = "perc")$percent[4],
    boot.ci(boot_hr, type = "perc")$percent[4],
    boot.ci(boot_hr_min, type = "perc")$percent[4],
    boot.ci(boot_light_integral, type = "perc")$percent[4],
    boot.ci(boot_light_max, type = "perc")$percent[4],
    boot.ci(boot_light_daytime, type = "perc")$percent[4],
    boot.ci(boot_light_hours, type = "perc")$percent[4]
  ),
  CI_upper = c(
    boot.ci(boot_temp, type = "perc")$percent[5],
    boot.ci(boot_range, type = "perc")$percent[5],
    boot.ci(boot_temp_max, type = "perc")$percent[5],
    boot.ci(boot_temp_min, type = "perc")$percent[5],
    boot.ci(boot_hr, type = "perc")$percent[5],
    boot.ci(boot_hr_min, type = "perc")$percent[5],
    boot.ci(boot_light_integral, type = "perc")$percent[5],
    boot.ci(boot_light_max, type = "perc")$percent[5],
    boot.ci(boot_light_daytime, type = "perc")$percent[5],
    boot.ci(boot_light_hours, type = "perc")$percent[5]
  )
)

# Round
results[, 3:6] <- round(results[, 3:6], 2)

# Print
print(results, row.names = FALSE)

# Save
write.csv(results, "habitat_comparison_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# ---- Summary for manuscript ----
cat("\n========== KEY RESULTS FOR MANUSCRIPT ==========\n")
cat(sprintf("\n--- TEMPERATURE ---\n"))
cat(sprintf("Mean daily: Puna = %.1f°C, Forest = %.1f°C, Diff = %.1f°C [%.1f, %.1f]\n", 
            results$Puna[1], results$Forest[1], results$Difference[1], results$CI_lower[1], results$CI_upper[1]))
cat(sprintf("Daily range: Puna = %.1f°C, Forest = %.1f°C, Diff = %.1f°C [%.1f, %.1f]\n", 
            results$Puna[2], results$Forest[2], results$Difference[2], results$CI_lower[2], results$CI_upper[2]))
cat(sprintf("Maximum: Puna = %.1f°C, Forest = %.1f°C, Diff = %.1f°C [%.1f, %.1f]\n", 
            results$Puna[3], results$Forest[3], results$Difference[3], results$CI_lower[3], results$CI_upper[3]))
cat(sprintf("Minimum: Puna = %.1f°C, Forest = %.1f°C, Diff = %.1f°C [%.1f, %.1f]\n", 
            results$Puna[4], results$Forest[4], results$Difference[4], results$CI_lower[4], results$CI_upper[4]))

cat(sprintf("\n--- HUMIDITY ---\n"))
cat(sprintf("Mean daily: Puna = %.1f%%, Forest = %.1f%%, Diff = %.1f%% [%.1f, %.1f]\n", 
            results$Puna[5], results$Forest[5], results$Difference[5], results$CI_lower[5], results$CI_upper[5]))
cat(sprintf("Minimum daily: Puna = %.1f%%, Forest = %.1f%%, Diff = %.1f%% [%.1f, %.1f]\n", 
            results$Puna[6], results$Forest[6], results$Difference[6], results$CI_lower[6], results$CI_upper[6]))

cat(sprintf("\n--- LIGHT INTENSITY ---\n"))
cat(sprintf("Daily integral: Puna = %.0f, Forest = %.0f lum/ft²·hours, Diff = %.0f [%.0f, %.0f]\n", 
            results$Puna[7], results$Forest[7], results$Difference[7], results$CI_lower[7], results$CI_upper[7]))
cat(sprintf("Maximum: Puna = %.0f, Forest = %.0f lum/ft², Diff = %.0f [%.0f, %.0f]\n", 
            results$Puna[8], results$Forest[8], results$Difference[8], results$CI_lower[8], results$CI_upper[8]))
cat(sprintf("Daytime mean: Puna = %.0f, Forest = %.0f lum/ft², Diff = %.0f [%.0f, %.0f]\n", 
            results$Puna[9], results$Forest[9], results$Difference[9], results$CI_lower[9], results$CI_upper[9]))
cat(sprintf("Hours with light: Puna = %.1f, Forest = %.1f hours, Diff = %.1f [%.1f, %.1f]\n", 
            results$Puna[10], results$Forest[10], results$Difference[10], results$CI_lower[10], results$CI_upper[10]))
cat(sprintf("Light integral ratio (Puna:Forest): %.1f [%.1f, %.1f]\n", 
            boot_light_ratio$t0,
            boot.ci(boot_light_ratio, type = "perc")$percent[4],
            boot.ci(boot_light_ratio, type = "perc")$percent[5]))

cat("\n✓ Bootstrap analysis complete\n")
```

Chunk 3: Visualizations
```{r}
# ============================================================
# CHUNK 3: VISUALIZATIONS
# ============================================================

# Color schemes
habitat_colors <- c("puna" = "darkred", "forest" = "darkgreen")
light_colors <- c("puna" = "orange", "forest" = "darkgreen")

# ---- Hourly summaries for diurnal plots ----
hourly_temp <- long_data %>%
  group_by(hour_of_day, habitat) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_val = mean(temp, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_val = sd(temp, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  mutate(se_val = ifelse(is.na(se_val) | is.nan(se_val), 0, se_val))

hourly_hr <- long_data %>%
  group_by(hour_of_day, habitat) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_val = mean(hr, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_val = sd(hr, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  mutate(se_val = ifelse(is.na(se_val) | is.nan(se_val), 0, se_val))

hourly_light <- light_data %>%
  group_by(hour_of_day, habitat) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_val = mean(light_intensity, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_val = sd(light_intensity, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  mutate(se_val = ifelse(is.na(se_val) | is.nan(se_val), 0, se_val))

# ---- PLOT A: Diurnal temperature ----
p_diurnal_temp <- ggplot(hourly_temp, 
                         aes(x = hour_of_day, y = mean_val, color = habitat, fill = habitat)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mean_val - 2*se_val, ymax = mean_val + 2*se_val), 
              alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = habitat_colors, labels = c("puna" = "Puna", "forest" = "Forest")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = habitat_colors, labels = c("puna" = "Puna", "forest" = "Forest")) +
  labs(x = "Hour of day", y = "Temperature (°C)", title = "Diurnal temperature pattern (± 2 SE)") +
  theme_minimal() + theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.title = element_blank())

# ---- PLOT B: Diurnal humidity ----
p_diurnal_hr <- ggplot(hourly_hr, 
                       aes(x = hour_of_day, y = mean_val, color = habitat, fill = habitat)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mean_val - 2*se_val, ymax = mean_val + 2*se_val), 
              alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = habitat_colors, labels = c("puna" = "Puna", "forest" = "Forest")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = habitat_colors, labels = c("puna" = "Puna", "forest" = "Forest")) +
  labs(x = "Hour of day", y = "Relative humidity (%)", title = "Diurnal humidity pattern (± 2 SE)") +
  theme_minimal() + theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.title = element_blank())

# ---- PLOT C: Diurnal light intensity ----
p_diurnal_light <- ggplot(hourly_light, 
                          aes(x = hour_of_day, y = mean_val, color = habitat, fill = habitat)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mean_val - 2*se_val, ymax = mean_val + 2*se_val), 
              alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = light_colors, labels = c("puna" = "Puna", "forest" = "Forest")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = light_colors, labels = c("puna" = "Puna", "forest" = "Forest")) +
  labs(x = "Hour of day", y = expression("Light intensity (lum/ft"^2*")"), 
       title = "Diurnal light intensity pattern (± 2 SE)") +
  theme_minimal() + theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.title = element_blank())

# ---- PLOT D: Temperature difference time series ----
p_temp_diff <- ggplot(daily_diff, aes(x = date)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = temp_diff), color = "darkred", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = results$Difference[1], color = "blue", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(results$CI_lower[1], results$CI_upper[1]), color = "blue", linetype = "dotted") +
  labs(y = "Δ Temperature (°C)", x = "Date", title = "Temperature difference (Puna − Forest)") +
  theme_minimal()

# ---- PLOT E: Humidity difference time series ----
p_hr_diff <- ggplot(daily_diff, aes(x = date)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = hr_diff), color = "darkblue", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = results$Difference[5], color = "blue", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(results$CI_lower[5], results$CI_upper[5]), color = "blue", linetype = "dotted") +
  labs(y = "Δ Humidity (%)", x = "Date", title = "Humidity difference (Puna − Forest)") +
  theme_minimal()

# ---- PLOT F: Light intensity integral difference time series ----
p_light_diff <- ggplot(daily_light, aes(x = date)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = light_integral_diff), color = "darkorange", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = results$Difference[7], color = "blue", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(results$CI_lower[7], results$CI_upper[7]), color = "blue", linetype = "dotted") +
  labs(y = expression("Δ Light integral (lum/ft"^2*"·hours)"), x = "Date", 
       title = "Light intensity integral difference (Puna − Forest)") +
  theme_minimal()

# ---- Display plots ----
cat("\n--- Diurnal patterns ---\n")
grid.arrange(p_diurnal_temp, p_diurnal_hr, p_diurnal_light, ncol = 1)

cat("\n--- Difference time series ---\n")
grid.arrange(p_temp_diff, p_hr_diff, p_light_diff, ncol = 1)

cat("\n✓ Visualizations complete\n")
```
